Initializes a Pebble event listener to log a message when the application is ready.

# Purpose
This code is a simple event listener setup for a Pebble smartwatch application. It uses the `Pebble.addEventListener` method to listen for the "ready" event, which indicates that the JavaScript environment is ready to execute code. When the "ready" event occurs, the code executes a function that logs the message "Hello world! - Sent from your javascript application." to the console. This script provides narrow functionality, primarily serving as an initialization or test message to confirm that the application is running correctly.
